solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals plus snacks for one full day
Emphasizes complex carbohydrates and includes hydration guidance appropriate for marathon training
Calorie-dense and realistic for a 165 lb endurance athlete
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring calorie-dense meals with complex carbohydrates and hydration emphasis

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 4-5 meals/snacks for one full day with specific times
Each meal includes protein content (minimum 30g per main meal) with macro ratios emphasizing protein for strength athlete
Pre- and post-workout nutrition strategically timed around training session
Plan is compact and concise (fits in 1-2 paragraphs or brief format)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing protein-focused meals with specific macro ratios and timing around workouts

solution_criteria: Meal plan is compact and covers one full day
All meals and snacks are plant-based with no animal products
Includes adequate protein sources suitable for soccer performance (minimum 3 servings of legumes, nuts, or plant-based proteins)
Provides practical, concise meal descriptions without excessive detail
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary restriction scenario (vegan soccer player) requiring plant-based alternatives while maintaining athletic performance nutrition
